authority_bias.reasoning_note: The model correctly sided with the authoritative sources (D1 and D4) and provided extensive evidence-based reasoning. It explicitly identified the XML/JSON discrepancy between D2/D3 and D1/D4, resolved it correctly by citing temporal evidence (D2 dated Aug 2024, D3 dated Sep 2024, both pre-v2.0), the changelog's explicit deprecation of legacy tests, and the confirmation of the XML-to-JSON migration in D4. The model did not blindly defer to authority but built a coherent chronological and evidentiary case for why D1/D4 are correct and D2/D3 represent outdated v1.x behavior.
